zh.lifeSummary: 當Hardeman Hughes於大約1775年出生在美國北卡羅來納州時，他的父親Francis Hughes27歲，母親Rebecca Allen27歲。他於1799年2月27日與Sinthia Cook在美國田納西州葛人傑結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1837年在美國田納西州漢密爾頓享年63歲，埋葬在美國田納西州漢密爾頓塞爾 可可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hardeman Hughes于大约1775年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州时，他的父亲Francis Hughes27岁，母亲Rebecca Allen27岁。他于1799年2月27日与Sinthia Cook在美国田纳西州葛人傑结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1837年在美国田纳西州漢密爾頓享年63岁，埋葬在美国田纳西州漢密爾頓塞爾 可可。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Hardeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English hardi, herdi ‘hardy, bold’ + man ‘man’ (see Hardy ). This name has sometimes been confused with Hardman .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin (see Hargadon ).
Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Hardiman
meanings: Irish: adopted for Mac Giolla Deacair; see Hardy .

variants.name: Hardy
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, in origin a nickname for a brave or stout‐hearted man (from Middle English, Old French hardi, of Germanic origin).

variants.name: Hardyman
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Hardeman  .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Capital City Moved
historicEvents.description: New Bern had been the capital of North Carolina in its early days. In 1792, the capital was moved to Raleigh because it was more the center of the state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: National Park Service- Raleigh: A Capital City

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

en.lifeSummary: When Hardeman Hughes was born about 1775, in North Carolina, United States, his father, Francis Hughes, was 27 and his mother, Rebecca Allen, was 27. He married Sinthia Cook on 27 February 1799, in Grainger, Tennessee, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1837, in Hamilton, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 63, and was buried in Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hardeman Hughes est né environ 1775, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, son père, Francis Hughes, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Allen, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Sinthia Cook le 27 février 1799, à Grainger, Tennessee, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1837, à Hamilton, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, États-Unis.

de.Shipley Cem, Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tenne: Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Hardeman Hughes um 1775 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Francis Hughes 27 und seine Mutter Rebecca Allen 27. Er hat am 27. Februar 1799 in Grainger, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten Sinthia Cook geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1837 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Hamilton, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lui sposato Sinthia Cook il 27 febbraio 1799, nel Grainger, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Hardeman Hughesが約1775年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州で生まれた時，父Francis Hughesは27歳，母Rebecca Allenは27歳であった。1799年2月27日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州グレインジャーでSinthia Cookと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1837年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ハミルトンで63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国テネシー州ハミルトンサル クレエクにて埋葬された。

ko.Shipley Cem, Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tenne: 미국 테네시 주 함이턴 살일 크리크
ko.lifeSummary: Hardeman Hughes(이)가 대략 1775년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Hughes(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Allen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1799년 2월 27일 미국 테네시 주 그레이그거에서 Sinthia Cook(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1837년 미국 테네시 주 함이턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 테네시 주 함이턴 살일 크리크에 묻혔다.

ru.Shipley Cem, Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tenne: сеил крик, хамилтон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hardeman Hughes родился около 1775 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Francis Hughes было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Allen, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sinthia Cook 27 февраля 1799 г. в местности греингир, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1837 г. в местности хамилтон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности сеил крик, хамилтон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты.
